features.title: Agent file deduplication
features.description: Convert 6 agent files from prose-heavy duplications into thin YAML-frontmatter wrappers pointing to role files as single source of truth. Remove all duplicated procedural prose from agent files.
steps: Read all 6 agent files (coordinator.md, evaluator.md, generator.md, initializer.md, planner.md, releaser.md)
Verify each agent file contains only YAML frontmatter + read-role-file instruction + ownership declaration
Verify no duplicated procedural prose remains in any agent file
Verify role files remain unchanged and contain canonical procedural content
Count lines across all 6 agent files and confirm reduction of approximately 280 lines from baseline
evidence: Sprint 1: All 6 agent files converted to thin wrappers (118 total lines, down from 435). Reduction: 317 lines. All unique content merged into role files.
features.notes: Baseline: 435 lines across 6 agent files (130+135+45+33+37+55). Must not change plugin.json agents[] array.

features.title: Command file shared pre-flight extraction
features.description: Extract the 4-step State Validation block duplicated across all 5 command files into a named section in SKILL.md. Each command file replaces inline copy with pointer to shared section.
steps: Read all 5 command files (init.md, run.md, session.md, reset.md, release.md)
Verify SKILL.md contains a 'Command Pre-Flight Validation' section with the shared 4-step block
Verify each command file references the shared pre-flight instead of inline duplication
Verify command-specific pre-flight steps remain inline in each command file
Count lines across all 5 command files and confirm reduction of approximately 100 lines from baseline
evidence: Sprint 1: Shared Command Pre-Flight Validation added to SKILL.md. All 5 command files reference it. Lines: 305 -> 273 (32-line reduction; estimate was high but functional goal met).

features.title: SKILL.md non-core section extraction
features.description: Move Harness Decay, Simplify Methodically, Review The Harness, Variant B/C full descriptions, and Context Reset details from SKILL.md to references/advanced.md. Keep one-line summaries with pointers.
steps: Verify references/advanced.md exists and contains the extracted sections
Verify SKILL.md contains pointer line to references/advanced.md
Verify SKILL.md no longer contains full Harness Decay, Simplify Methodically, Review The Harness sections
Verify Variant B/C have only one-line summaries in SKILL.md with pointer to advanced.md
Count SKILL.md lines and confirm reduction of at least 60 lines from baseline (777 lines)
evidence: Sprint 2: advanced.md created with 7 sections. SKILL.md reduced from 787 to 727 lines (60-line reduction). 6 pointer references added.
features.notes: Baseline: SKILL.md is 777 lines. Target: 717 or fewer. Creates new file references/advanced.md.

features.title: Codex detection simplification
features.description: Condense the 45-line 4-step Codex detection procedure in the evaluator role file to a 3-line decision tree. Move the detailed procedure to references/advanced.md.
steps: Read evaluator role file (roles/evaluator.md)
Verify Codex detection is expressed as a concise decision tree (10 lines or fewer)
Verify same output fields are recorded (review_mode, config_use_codex, codex_available, detection_result, fallback_reason)
Verify detailed Step 1-4 procedure exists in references/advanced.md
Count evaluator role file lines and confirm reduction of approximately 30 lines from baseline (104 lines)
evidence: Sprint 2: Codex detection condensed from ~25 lines to ~10-line decision tree. All 5 output fields preserved. Detailed procedure in advanced.md.
features.notes: Depends on F-001 (agent dedup removes duplicate from agent file) and F-003 (advanced.md exists for the moved content).

features.title: Conditional evaluator calibration
features.description: Make evaluator-calibration.md required only when expected_sprint_count > 3. For shorter runs, calibration is optional. Update coordinator and evaluator enforcement logic.
steps: Read coordinator role file and verify calibration enforcement is conditional on expected_sprint_count > 3
Read evaluator role file and verify calibration section reflects conditional requirement
Verify that for runs with expected_sprint_count <= 3, calibration file is not required
Verify evaluator still scores with anchors even without persisted calibration file
Count lines across modified files and confirm reduction of approximately 20 lines

features.title: Merge retrospective into progress log
features.description: Append retrospective sections directly to progress.md under '## Retrospective -- Rounds X-Y' heading instead of creating separate retro-RX-RY.md files. Remove retro template from patterns.md.
steps: Read patterns.md and verify retro-RX-RY.md template has been removed
Read patterns.md and verify progress.md template includes a retrospective section format
Read coordinator role file and verify retro generation appends to progress.md
Verify SKILL.md retrospective section references inline progress.md format
Count lines removed from patterns.md and confirm reduction of approximately 15 lines
features.notes: Baseline: patterns.md is 738 lines. Retro template is approximately 20 lines.
